settings.max_accounts_help: Maximum number of accounts a user can link. Set to 0 for unlimited.
settings.log_retention_days_help: Number of days to keep activity logs. Set to 0 to keep forever.

logs.title: Linked Account Activity Log
logs.clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all linked account logs? This cannot be undone.

page.title: Linked Accounts
page.switched_notice: You are currently using a linked account. Your parent account is {name}.
page.no_accounts: You haven't linked any accounts yet. Create a new account or link an existing one to get started.
page.unlink_confirm: Are you sure you want to unlink this account? The account will still exist but will no longer be linked.
page.max_reached: You have reached the maximum of {max} linked accounts.
page.create_description: Create a brand new account that will be linked to your current account.
page.link_description: Link an account that already exists. You'll need to provide the account's password to verify ownership.
page.username_placeholder: Enter username for the new account
page.email_placeholder: Enter email for the new account
page.password_placeholder: Enter password for the new account (optional)
page.link_password_placeholder: Enter the account's password to verify
page.identification_placeholder: Enter the username or email of the existing account
page.child_info: This is a linked account. To manage linked accounts, create new ones, or link existing accounts, switch back to the parent account.
